description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: Black dial with black and yellow hands Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Date aperture on the dial, branding on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistant Size Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
